Description:
  User secrets retriever

Usage:
  Asos.UserSecretsRetriever [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  retrieve  Retrieve user secrets based on the provided configuration

commands.payload:
Description:
  User secrets retriever

Usage:
  Asos.UserSecretsRetriever [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  retrieve  Retrieve user secrets based on the provided configuration

result.stdout:
Description:
  Retrieve user secrets based on the provided configuration

Usage:
  Asos.UserSecretsRetriever retrieve [options]

Options:
  --project <project>                              Path to project. Defaults to the current directory.
  --secrets-configuration <secrets-configuration>  The name of the file containing the configuration for the secrets you want to retrieve. Defaults to appsettings.usersecrets.json
  --diagnostics                                    Enables diagnostic output. Useful for understanding authentication issues.
  -?, -h, --help                                   Show help and usage information
